scripts.deploycf: wrangler types && pnpm prettier --write . && wrangler deploy
scripts.dev: wrangler types && pnpm prettier --write . && wrangler dev --port 8080

NVIDIA_API_KEY.description: NVIDIA NIM API key — get one free at https://build.nvidia.com/ (open any model page and click 'Get API Key'). This is the only required secret; the Worker uses it to authenticate every request to integrate.api.nvidia.com. Your NVIDIA key never touches the client.
